mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 165 > locations > The rest of Clan Wolf fought losing battle
mechanics.excerpt: The rest of Clan Wolf fought losing battle against the Jade Falcons Both conflicts ended suddenly,in surprising series twists. Having taken back from Victor Davion the worlds that had once belonged to the Free Worlds League, Thomas Marik concluded peace treaty with the Archon prince_ Sun-Tzu Liao_ unwilling continue his own campaign without Marik's backing: grudgingly agreed to end hostilities The Kell Hounds, having refused Katherine Steiner's demand for aid in defending the Lyran Alliance , established an anti-Clan defensive zone cen- tered on Arc Royal.
